title: Add M4 lamp network owner stores
summary: Add authoritative M4 lamp network state for linked lamps, maintenance, human-claim fields, bounded shadow-gap propagation, metrics and structured reasons.
acceptance: Lamp network state owns linked lamp groups maintenance fuel wick damage humanClaim and shadowGap integer rule fields in sim-core
Visual light and UI overlays are read-only derived projections and cannot mutate lamp rule fields
Lamp mutations dirty exact lamp group cell room chunk and projection keys with bounded deterministic drain metrics
Actor and anomaly risk reads use indexed lamp-gap candidates and Top-K caps rather than scanning all lamps map cells or entities
Focused tests cover deterministic dirty propagation stale projection rejection structured reasons and no full-map normal-tick diffusion

history.details: Created by WM-0061 M4 planning DAG; remains proposed until dependencies are done.

objective: Implement the first M4 authoritative lamp rule-field surface without Chronicle, obligation, anomaly, director, UI authority or public protocol scope.
forbiddenPaths: obligation town-rule anomaly crisis-chain or director implementation
public save format or schema changes
visual-only lamp authority global scan or unversioned cache workaround
benchmarkImpact: Adds focused lamp dirty backlog active gap count group update and projection-size counters; baseline updates wait for WM-0070.
reviewRouting: Simulation-engineer completes to reviewer; systems-architect must be consulted before changing map ownership, public exports, save scope or lamp field semantics.
rollbackModel: Revert M4 lamp store, tests, metrics and docs; leave M0-M3 map and M3 ordinary-life behavior unchanged.
ownerGate: Keep lamp rule fields authoritative in sim-core only
Do not let visual light or UI write humanClaim or shadowGap
Use exact dirty keys and bounded drain budgets
Block on any need for public protocol save schema dependency UI authority or M5 scope

sparkEligibility.reason: Deterministic simulation owner-store and map/lamp authority work is not suitable for Spark.
